TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang ray'in ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 148 buwan, 352 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 41% kyan ku 143 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 59% kyan ku 209 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 37%, Tayan 2%, Paywan 1%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na ray'in hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na ray'in hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na ray'in hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na ray'in hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na ray'in hya' ga kaehkaba:oS. tay mkyahu' na ray'in hya' ga batbato'an. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ rajʔin ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu s~ɕitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na rajʔin ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na rajʔin ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na rajʔin ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na rajʔin ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na rajʔin ħjaʔ ɣa kaeħkaβa:os~ɕ. taj mkjaħuʔ na rajʔin ħjaʔ ɣa βatβatoʔan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang ray'in ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 148 buwan, 352 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 41% kyan ku 143 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 59% kyan ku 209 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 37%, Tayan 2%, Paywan 1%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na ray'in hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na ray'in hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na ray'in hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na ray'in hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na ray'in hya' ga kaehkaba:oS. tay mkyahu' na ray'in hya' ga batbato'an. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ rajʔin ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu s~ɕitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na rajʔin ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na rajʔin ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na rajʔin ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na rajʔin ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na rajʔin ħjaʔ ɣa kaeħkaβa:os~ɕ. taj mkjaħuʔ na rajʔin ħjaʔ ɣa βatβatoʔan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
